title: JFrog Artifactory Firm-Wide Outage — RESOLVED
rca: Artifactory primary storage volume reached 100% capacity at 07:58 UTC. Root cause: automated log rotation job (cron: logrotate.d/artifactory) failed silently on 2026-05-15 due to a stale lock file (/var/run/logrotate.lock held by a zombie process), allowing binary cache and build logs to accumulate and exhaust the 2TB volume over ~14 hours. Disk usage alerts were configured at 95% — the volume filled the final 2% within 10 minutes, leaving no time for automated intervention.
resolution_steps: 1. Emergency volume resize: 2TB → 4TB on primary node (08:15–08:22 UTC)
4. Stale lock file cleared, logrotate re-enabled
business_impact: All CI/CD pipelines firm-wide blocked for 62 minutes. Payments release train delayed by 90 minutes. Approximately 47 engineers impacted across 8 squads. No customer-facing service degradation occurred — only internal build systems affected.

communication_log.note: Bridge call opened with JFrog infra team
All systems confirmed healthy — ticket closed
